method: Country-level Google Trends RSS snapshot first, then manual editorial selection, then manual SERP/source review. No raw Google Search HTML scraping.

selectedMarkets.reason: Actual US RSS trend tied to a consumer-tech buying decision. Sports, lottery, celebrity, and legal-personal-injury terms were excluded as poor fit or high risk.
Actual Spain RSS trend with public-service intent. Lottery and sports terms were excluded.
Actual Brazil RSS trend tied to a current consumer purchase/deal question. Sports, weather, and tax-deadline terms were excluded for this run.
Actual Japan RSS trend tied to iPhone 18 rumor coverage. Entertainment and sports terms were excluded.
Actual Korea RSS trend tied to admissions policy and school-violence reflection. Politics, sports, and celebrity body/health gossip terms were excluded.

excludedPatternExamples: crime/death accident terms without durable article value
